app.name: Gemini Web to API
app.one_liner: Reverse-engineered REST API that exposes Google Gemini's web interface functionality without requiring official API keys, using browser cookies for authentication.

screens.name: API Gateway
screens.purpose: Serve as the primary interface for sending prompts and receiving responses from the reverse-engineered Gemini API.

rust_commands.name: handle_deep_research
rust_commands.purpose: Initiate two-phase deep research mode for complex queries (currently in development).

rust_commands.name: select_model
rust_commands.purpose: Allow user to choose from available Gemini models detected on the web interface.

rust_commands.name: send_prompt
rust_commands.purpose: Forward user prompt to Gemini web interface using authenticated session and return structured response.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add model selection from detected Gemini web models
week 1: Expose /v1/chat/completions endpoint compatible with OpenAI spec
week 1: Optimize response latency based on performance feedback
acceptance_tests: API returns a 200 response with generated text when a valid model is selected.
Deep research mode initiates two-phase processing when enabled (pending implementation).
Performance optimization reduces response time below previous baseline.
System accepts valid browser cookies and successfully proxies a prompt to Gemini web interface.
